description: This file defines a custom theme for a Flutter application called 'RetroTheme'. It provides specific color schemes, text styles, and widget themes (like AppBar, Card, InputDecoration, Chip, FAB, NavigationBar, and Divider) to implement a consistent retro-modern UI appearance.

classes.name: RetroTheme
classes.description: A class encapsulating a custom Flutter ThemeData for a retro-modern UI theme, including color schemes and styling methods for various widgets.

methods.name: lightTheme
methods.description: A getter that returns a ThemeData object configured with the custom retro theme for light mode.

methods.name: _retroTextTheme
methods.description: A private static method that adjusts a provided TextTheme to fit the retro-modern style, emphasizing bold headings and letter spacing.
